task_objective: Add date in MM/DD/YYYY format to Last Operation timestamp display (which currently only indicates time) in the frontend UI.
design_decisions: Implemented a `formatDateMDY` helper function in the frontend which parses the ISO-8601 timestamp string, extracts the date part, and formats it as MM/DD/YYYY.
Updated the Last Operation timestamp renderer in the frontend UI to display the formatted date followed by the 12-hour formatted time: (MM/DD/YYYY H:MM AM/PM).
Added a static frontend assertion test to ensure `formatDateMDY` exists and is correctly invoked on the history timestamp.

results.precommit_hooks: All hooks and build verification passed
